description: Perform heteroscedasticity diagnostic testing and robust estimation using the loaded 'food.gdt' dataset. Estimate an OLS model with 'food_exp' as the dependent variable and 'income' as the regressor. Conduct both White's and Breusch-Pagan tests for heteroscedasticity on this model, then re-estimate the model using Heteroscedasticity-Consistent (Robust) standard errors. Save the initial OLS results, both test outputs, and the robust estimation results to a single text file at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/hetero_test_results.txt
